message:
test(rchd): Add self_test coverage tests

Add 13 new tests for SelfTestHistory and SelfTestService:
- test_self_test_history_capacity_limit_runs
- test_self_test_history_load_from_file_nonexistent
- test_self_test_history_load_from_file_with_data
- test_self_test_history_load_from_file_with_invalid_lines
- test_self_test_history_record_run_without_persistence
- test_self_test_history_record_result_without_persistence
- test_self_test_run_report_serialization
- test_status_with_cron_schedule
- test_status_with_last_run

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
